questions.question: What does the tokenTraitSeed mapping store?
options: The random bytes32 value used to derive all traits for a token
questions.correctAnswer: The random bytes32 value used to derive all traits for a token

questions.question: The onRandomnessReceived() function can be called directly by users to set their NFT traits.
What happens if you query an NFT's traits before the randomness callback completes?
The RandomTraitsNFT contract inherits from both ERC721 and ______.
Why is the NFT metadata and image generated fully on-chain?
options: It eliminates external dependencies and ensures the NFT is truly permanent
It makes the NFT load faster
It's required by the ERC721 standard
questions.correctAnswer: It eliminates external dependencies and ensures the NFT is truly permanent

questions.question: Once tokenTraitSeed is set for an NFT, the traits can be changed by calling mint() again.
How long does it typically take for NFT traits to be revealed after minting?
